This action plan supplements the Instagram Manual (10xdownload.com/ig1) to make sure
you’re crystal clear on the actions to take to get your desired results. When in doubt, refer to
the manual. Make it happen!
CREATE ACCOUNT AND SET UP PROFILE	STEP
1
Your profile will be your main hub of all your Instagram marketing efforts.
Your profile is especially significant because it is the only place you can provide a
link to your website (beside stories). While it is not needed immediately, the
Story Highlights feature on your profile will provide a lot of additional
opportunities for linking.
IMPORTANT: Be sure to activate your account as a business account
Make sure to go through the provided checklist so you don’t miss any details.
• Instagram Intro and Tour Tutorial (10xresource.com/ig1)
• Instagram Account Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/ig4)
Recommended Resource:
Launch Your Profile, Reach 100 Quality
Followers and Start to Monetize!
YOUR GOAL
INSTAGRAM ACTION PLAN
START REGULARLY ADDING CONTENT	STEP
2
Once your profile is live, you will want to immediately start adding regular
content. The frequency is up to you, but the important part is being consistent.
This can be a wide variety of content including images, video, stories, reels and
live video.

-- 1 of 4 --

INVITE FRIENDS AND FAMILY	STEP
3
After your profile is up and there is at least one post, you should invite anyone
who you think would support your business. Remember that it isn’t about how
many followers you get, it is how many quality followers that will engage with
your brand on Instagram.
PROMOTE YOUR PAGE EVERYWHERE	STEP
4
Include a link to your Instagram link on your website, on business cards, in your
email footer, anywhere you can think of. If you have an email list, send an email
inviting people to follow you. It helps to let people know why your page will be of
value to them.
ENGAGE AND EXPAND NETWORK DAILY	STEP
5
As you continue to post content, it is essential that you engage with your followers
every single day. Every quality follower is important to get to 100. Reply to every
comment and tag people whenever it is appropriate.
Also, make an effort to follow profiles and people within your same niche. Find
people who are highly active on similar pages. You will want to continually expand
your network to get closer and closer to top influencers.
• Instagram Management Checklist (10xdownload.com/ig6)
• Instagram Growth Strategy (10xdownload.com/ig3)

-- 2 of 4 --

PROMOTE POSTS TO IDEAL TARGET AUDIENCE	STEP
6
Realize that much of what you’re doing with your regular posts is experiment
with messaging. You want to find what most resonates with your core audience.
When you find posts that get a high rate of likes or comments, spend a little
money promoting those posts to your target audience. More details on
promoting posts in the manual.
Depending on what you sell, your strategy will vary. Keep in mind that if you are
sending people off of Instagram to your website, this can only be done from
Stories or from your Profile. This is illustrated in the flowchart below.
BEGIN TO SHARE YOUR PRODUCT OR SERVICE	STEP
7
On Instagram you are going to monetize in one of two ways:
• Instagram Monetization Strategy (10xdownload.com/ig2)
Recommended Resource:
• Instagram Promote Documentation (10xresource.com/ig10)
Recommended Resource:
MAKE YOUR FIRST SALE AND CELEBRATE!	STEP
8
If you continue to add value, your buyers will become your biggest fans and lead
to more sales!
Sending people to a website
Engaging in direct messaging communication
